title: 30 Complete Records Collection
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Complete Records Collection?             Quote Post by Ether_Pleinair » Wed Nov 14, 2012 7:40 pm So, because either no one has asked yet, or because I'm just not savvy enough to find an existing post... Has there been ANY word on whether or not there will be another collection of any sort for 3.0? Please do forgive me if this question has been posted elsewhere...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 14, 2012 7:46 pm Both 1.0 and 2.0 had their records collection released after they made their way to Japanese BD/DVD, so I'd imagine the same would be true for 3.0 CRC.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Thu Nov 15, 2012 5:49 am ^And thats a good thing. Right now I'm broke for cash! To spend another 300 bucks on these artbooks? Blasphemy!

[]:             Quote Post by Ether_Pleinair » Sun Jan 27, 2013 3:21 pm and then...this. There are spoilers for character and Evangelion designs through the concealed link, so beware!  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Jan 28, 2013 6:53 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: ^And thats a good thing. Right now I'm broke for cash! To spend another 300 bucks on these artbooks? Blasphemy!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Feb 07, 2013 7:41 pm Ether_Pleinair wrote: and then...this. There are spoilers for character and Evangelion designs through the concealed link, so beware!  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Feb 07, 2013 10:47 pm Ether_Pleinair wrote: and then...this. There are spoilers for character and Evangelion designs through the concealed link, so beware!  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Craftee » Tue May 20, 2014 10:31 pm Anyone know when they will be releasing this crc?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue May 20, 2014 11:24 pm Nothing announced yet. When it is the forum will be spammed with the news.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed May 21, 2014 5:08 pm I really can't buy the CRCs. Will they still be available in some years?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed May 21, 2014 5:21 pm Been over a year since the BD came out, Khara sure is taking their time.....

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed May 21, 2014 5:24 pm Both 1.0 and 2.0 CRC we're reprinted and rereleased a month before Q hit theatres. I would expect them to do that again once in a while.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed May 21, 2014 6:05 pm It's probably not going to come out till after 4.0. From what I heard 3.0 and 4.0 were supposed to be one movie so they are probably doing it to avoid spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed May 21, 2014 6:10 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Both 1.0 and 2.0 CRC we're reprinted and rereleased a month before Q hit theatres. I would expect them to do that again once in a while.

[]:             Quote Post by LightDragonman » Wed May 21, 2014 8:49 pm Not sure where to post this, but apparently, [s] if Google translate is accurate[/s], Minna No Eva reported that one of the reasons for 4.0's delayed release is due to many of the animators being shifted to work on several of the recent Ghibli films. [url]http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3038.html[/url] Your thoughts? Considering that the next film that they worked on is finally being released this July, you expect production to start speeding up soon?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu May 22, 2014 3:15 am ^ Well, it says that many animators were working on the Ghibli work "The Tale of Princess Kaguya", which delayed the production of FINAL, but that was known since some time. What I didn't know is that there's another Ghibli film on production, "Memories of Marnie", that monopolize much of Japan's pool of freelance animators, which delays again the production for FINAL, which would explain why we still haven't gotten any information on its advancement yet. But yes, unless there yet another Ghibli work monopolizing all the freelance animators, FINAL's production should restart soon.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu May 22, 2014 1:24 pm Add to that that some Rebuild staff worked on the second half of Kill la Kill . But I'm OK with that.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu May 22, 2014 1:24 pm Well, we'll get it when we get it. And it will be amazing.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Thu May 22, 2014 1:52 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Well, we'll get it when we get it. And it will be amazing.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu May 22, 2014 7:12 pm 4.0 will be f...... awesome. I miss the trailers. I want Anno to release something. Even the trailers are amazing.
summary:
[]: 3.0 Complete Records Collection?             Quote Post by Ether_Pleinair » Wed Nov 14, 2012 7:40 pm So, because either no one has asked yet, or because I'm just not savvy enough to find an existing post... Has there been ANY word on whether or not there will be another collection of any sort for 3.0? Please do forgive me if this question has been posted elsewhere...

[]:
